calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-05-2021 Set For Trial On May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 305

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-05-2021 Continued To May-05-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-14-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED-MAY-05-2021:

Eliot S. Winchell, Plaintiff / Respondent in propria persona;
Misha Nishi, Esq., Counsel for Defendant / Appellant Bay Area Air Quality Management District (BAAQMD). Also present, Defendant's witness Tin Le.

This cause comes on calendar this day, as assigned by the Presiding Judge, for hearing of small claims appeal, trial de novo. All the above parties are sworn.

Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf. The following Plaintiff's exhibits are introduced and identified:

Exhibit A Clean Cars for All (CCFA) Award Letter dated 04/29/2020
Exhibit H Email - CCFA Project Terminated dated 05/02/2020
Exhibit C CCFA Program Terms and Conditions dated 12/31/2019
Exhibit O Evidence of Change of Address - 527 Seaver Dr - First page Copy of Lease
Exhibit E CCFA Final Regulation Order - California Air Resources Board (CARB)
Exhibit P Emails - Correspondence with Air District Staff Specialist, Tin Le dated 05/05/2020
Exhibit M BAAQMD Website Modifications - "New Applicant" Portion dated 02/01/2021
Exhibit I Internal Emails - BAAQMD staff confused on household dependency dated 05/05/2020
Exhibit R Clean Cars for All (CCFA) Terms and Conditions
Exhibit S Clean Cars for All (CCFA) - "How to Apply"

Defendant's counsel Ms. Nishi briefs the Court and responds to examination by the Court. The
following Defendant's Exhibits are introduced and identified:

Exhibit 5 Anne-christine Pajunen Clean Cars for All Applications, All Program Terms and Conditions, and 2018 Federal Income Tax Return listing Eliot Winchell as a dependant
Exhibit 6 Examples of Clean Cars for All grants being terminated or rescinded due to "one household" rule
Exhibit 3 Eliot Winchell Clean Cars for All Program Terms and conditions dated 4/21/2020

Mr. Tin Le testifies on behalf of the Defendant. The following Defendant's exhibits are introduced and identified:
Exhibit 4 Correspondence with Eliot Winchell
Exhibit 7 Declaration of Vanessa Morelan

The matter is submitted by both parties and taken under submission by the Court.

Plaintiff's and Defendant's exhibits are retained by the court.

Judge: Hon. Mary E. Wiss; Clerk: L. Fong; Proceedings Not Reported; Dept. 305.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-18-2021 Judgment Entered
